componentDescription: Displays transient, non-disruptive messages to inform users about system changes or actions.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for the toast instance.

variant.description: Specifies the visual style or semantic type of the toast (e.g., success, error, warning).

title.description: The main heading or title text displayed on the toast.

description.description: An optional detailed message or descriptive text for the toast.

onClose.description: A callback function invoked when the toast is dismissed or closed.

isClosable.description: Indicates whether the user can manually close the toast.

action.description: An optional callback function to execute when an action button within the toast is clicked.

actionText.description: The text label for the optional action button.

showIcon.description: Determines if a default icon associated with the variant should be displayed.

theme.description: The theme to apply to the toast component for styling.

views.description: Optional custom styles for various parts of the toast component, overriding default views.

duration.description: The duration in milliseconds after which the toast automatically disappears.

render.description: A custom render function to provide entirely custom content for the toast.

icon.description: An optional custom React node to be used as the toast's icon.

isVisible.description: Controls the visibility state of the individual toast instance.

position.description: The desired screen position for the toast container (e.g., 'top-right', 'bottom-left').

gap.description: The spacing in pixels between individual toasts within the container.

limit.description: The maximum number of toasts that can be displayed simultaneously in the container.

containerStyle.description: Optional custom CSS styles to apply to the toast container.
